reviews.school_name: Orchids The International School - Jubilee Hills
reviews.author: nitish agarwal
reviews.review_body: Till 2022 school was good but in 2023 school management has been pathetic and very poor in communication with parents. Even if you try to get an appointment to talk or put your concerns..then try to only defend and try to prove that there is no fault on their side. Biggest problem is not ready to listen and improve even if child suffers.

reviews.school_name: Orchids The International School - Jubilee Hills
reviews.author: Rubiya khan
reviews.review_body:
Worst experience with this school.
The principal is just a dummy. Every change that takes place is by “central team” but when we ask for email or contact details they never give.
Whatever grievances are put forward are never answered. Circulars are shared last moment. Any cancellation of events are informed last moment causing inconvenience to parents. All events are conducted in bachupally campus as there is no place in jubilee hills.
Ground is very small. Timetable keeps changing every 2-3 months. Grade 1 class is on 2nd floor. Small kids have to carry their bags themselves all the way up. Teachers themselves appear fed up. The coordinators don’t have any information. Mostly they don’t answer the calls, if they do they don’t have an answer to any query. One day a week was supposed to be a no bag day but without information to parents it’s converted to regular classes. All events are badly organized. All branches combine together for one event which results in too much rush and disorganisation. Event photos and class photos are not shared with parents despite repeated asking.

reviews.school_name: Orchids The International School - Jubilee Hills
reviews.author: Taduri Lavanya
reviews.review_body: My kid likes the school very much before I joined him this school I have gon through more than 7-8 school as a parent I found the curriculum is super. Finally we all like this school.

reviews.school_name: Orchids The International School - Jubilee Hills
reviews.author: Shamem Shamemást
reviews.review_body: The school hosts various sporting and other co-curricular activities which improves your child's overall development. The library in the school instills the reading habits in our kids.

reviews.school_name: Orchids The International School - Jubilee Hills
reviews.author: Rumasa u Sani
reviews.review_body: Every parent can admit their children here blindly, because everything here has been maintained and students are taught under proper guidance of skillfull teachers. It's a completely good choice!

reviews.school_name: Orchids The International School - Jubilee Hills
reviews.author: Jayant Kumar
reviews.review_body:
Save your kids from this school. When I relocated to hyderabad this was the school which was strategically located & the school made tall promises of good teaching & extra curricular activities. So I put my 2 kids in this school. The head mistress gives a long & powerful speech to keep you engaged. However, the 2 years that my kids spent in the school were the worst. Their grades dropped. They were not interested in studies. They were becoming introverts. The teachers gave 0 feedback during ptms. We raised the concerns to the headmistress, however, nothing changed.

We realized our foolishness when we got to know that inspite paying school fees, my kid has been marked as "left school". she was in a different section than where she was supposed to be & for 3 months neither her class teacher nor the class teacher of the correct section called out the issue.  She was being marked as absent for 3 months & no one called the parents. This came to notice only when my kids grades dropped drastically & I realized that she was not getting any homeworks or worksheets. On highlighting this the headmistress did absolutely nothing.

We took our kids out & put them in another school. Their grades have improved over the past year. They are very active now. A lot more engaged with the teachers in the new school.

A humble request from me to save your kids from this school. Don't destroy your kids' future here.
